basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Senior Surveyor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 05 Senior Surveyor. Candidates with BCA, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through GSSSB website, gsssb.gujarat.gov.in/.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in relevant discipline, BCA, B.Sc. IT

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GSSSB Senior Surveyor, Class-3 Recruitment 2026 can follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board Senior Surveyor Recruitment 2026
